---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Package

Which package does this relate to? (e.g. `flagpost`, `searchcraft`, or `new package`)

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work? Include API examples if possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've considered.
